title: Campus Software Library License for SigmaPlot
body: SigmaPlot License Information Campus has purchased a SigmaPlot license capable of hosting 20 users simultaneously at any given time. Since multiple users will be sharing the same licenses, please shut down the software on your PC when not using it. The license server is hosted by CALS IT. For installation information, please refer to Campus Software Library Sigmaplot Installation . For troubleshooting information, please refer to Campus Software Library Sigmaplot Troubleshooting . Once installed, if you are attempting to start SigmaPlot and are unable to do so, please contact the CALS IT Administrators at cals-it-admin@cals.wisc.edu . License Restrictions for SigmaPlot Software May only be used by current UW-Madison faculty, staff, and students May only be used on computers owned or leased by UW-Madison May only exclusively be used for research May not be used for commercial gain May not be modified Must be uninstalled when you are no longer affiliated with UW-Madison
